title: Corrective fix for B-54985587-test: Test TUI bug: bead detail popup does not scroll (event.stop swallows scroll keys)
description:
Blocked reason: Popup scrolling is still broken under targeted TUI regression tests; pagedown, end/home, and j-based scrolling do not move `#detail-popup-dialog`.

Remaining work: Developer needs to fix popup scrolling behavior in src/agent_takt/tui/app.py so the focused `#detail-popup-dialog` VerticalScroll actually gains scrollable content and responds to native keys. Current failures are at tests/test_tui_app.py:2204 (pagedown no-op), 2240-2241 (end/home cannot scroll because max_scroll_y stays 0), and 2326 (j does not scroll the popup).
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-54985587-test.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
conflict_risks: Low. This bead only added focused regression tests in tests/test_tui_app.py, but any concurrent edits near the popup regression section may need a simple merge.
